creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->crees

I'm really sorry that this PR sat idle so long Alex, and thank you for 
the work you put into it. ports/162059 has updated net/freeswitch-core 
to the latest release, and hopefully has done away with the need for 
freeswitch-snapshot. If you disagree that freeswitch-snapshot is no 
longer necessary, please get in contact with me and we can discuss it.
